errors.authToken: The Meta token (ACCESS_TOKEN) expired or is invalid.
errors.authTokenHint: Generate a new token in Meta Business and update the Vercel variable.
errors.permission: Meta rejected the operation due to insufficient permissions.
errors.permissionHint: Ensure the token has WhatsApp Business access for the correct WABA.
errors.rateLimitHint: Wait a few minutes before retrying.
errors.transient: Meta did not respond (temporary error). This is not a panel failure.
errors.transientWithStatus: Meta did not respond. Global status: {status}.
errors.transientHint: Retry in 1–2 minutes or tap Sync.
errors.platformOutageHint: This is a global Meta incident, not your account. Track status on metastatus.com.
errors.unknown: Could not complete the operation on Meta.
